Historic Setting: La casetta delle stelle in Langhirano offers a luxury tent experience within a historic building. The property features a beautiful garden and stunning mountain views.
Comfortable Accommodation: Each tent includes a private bathroom with free toiletries, a shower, and a private entrance. Guests can relax in the serene surroundings and enjoy garden views.
Convenient Facilities: The property provides private check-in and check-out services, luggage storage, and free on-site private parking. Additional amenities include a continental and Italian breakfast with vegetarian options.
Nearby Attractions: Parma Airport is 29 km away, while Parma Train Station and Parco Ducale are 27 km from the property.
